title: Feta Bliss Whole30
description: A rich and crumbly whole30-friendly dish featuring feta cheese for a sick-day comfort food sensation.

ingredients.name: 1 cup whole milk ricotta
ingredients.notes: Ensure it's whole milk ricotta for the best texture

ingredients.name: 2 tablespoons feta cheese
ingredients.notes: Crumbled and aged to add richness and flavor

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup chopped fresh herbs (e.g., parsley, mint)

instructions: In a mixing bowl, combine the whole milk ricotta with crumbled feta cheese.
Season with sea salt and stir until fully combined.
Fold in chopped fresh herbs for a burst of flavor.
Serve immediately or chill to preserve its texture.
